method_1.method: Root powder taken with warm water at bedtime.

medicinal_uses: Effective natural treatment for Insomnia and sleep apnea.
Calms nervous anxiety and panic attacks.

safety_profile.warning: Safe for short-term; long-term use can cause mild dizziness.
safety_profile.medical_supervision: Use under the guidance of a qualified Ayurvedic practitioner.
